empty.title: No subaccounts yet
empty.description: You don't have any subaccounts. Subaccounts let you organize your ICP across separate balances under the same principal.

createSubAccount.title: Create Sub-Account
createSubAccount.description: Create a new sub-account to organize your ICP. The name helps you identify the account.

settings.title: Subaccounts
settings.description: Enable subaccounts to organize your ICP across multiple balances under your principal.
settings.disabledDescription: The accounts view has been removed.
